urlencoded.description: Configuration type (text, json, xml, yaml, properties)

description.content: Configuration type (text, json, xml, yaml, properties)
Long polling endpoint to listen for configuration changes. The request blocks until a change is detected or timeout (default 30s).
Returns the revision history of a configuration item.
Returns the previous version of a configuration item.
Registers a service instance to the Nacos registry.
Removes a service instance from the Nacos registry.
Returns all instances of a service.

description.content: Sends a heartbeat to keep the instance alive.
Updates the health status of an instance (for persistent instances only).
Deletes a service (must have no instances).
Returns the details of a service.
Returns a paginated list of services.
Updates a Nacos system switch value.
Returns the list of Nacos cluster members.

Nacos Open API for service discovery, configuration management, and namespace management. Nacos supports dynamic service discovery, service configuration, service metadata, and traffic management.
